[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011000 3
1 1011111 6
2 1101010 4
3 1111011 6
4 1001010 3
5 0001010 2
6 1010000 2
7 1011111 6

12 21 1011000 3 match 0

45 54 1001010 3 match 4
56 65 1001010 3 match 4
67 76 0001000 1
70 07 0000000 a
